title: I need an automation for - When Column changes, create a board from template
excerpt:
Hi, 
I’m looking for a simple automation that when a formula column changes, a board will created. 
How can I do that please? 
Thank you!

posts.author: Lustig (Liran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I’m looking for a simple automation that when a formula column changes, a board will created.

How can I do that please?

Thank you!

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: Formula columns cannot be used to trigger automations because their values are client-side only. The server doesn’t store the value, and the formulas are in fact calculated in your browser for display only.

posts.author: Lustig (Liran)
posts.cookedHtml: OK, now I understand why it isn’t working. Thank you for your explanation.
